ui.title: Multiple Series 2
ui.desc: Show Several Series in the same Chart.

data.sql: SELECT SERIES, CATEGORY, VL FROM (SELECT S.SERIES, C.CATEGORY, NVL(COUNT(F.FA_BUSI_TYPE),0) VL FROM (SELECT 'DD' SERIES FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PF' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'POF' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RD' FROM DUAL) S CROSS JOIN (SELECT 'DD' CATEGORY FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'PF' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'POF' FROM DUAL UNION ALL SELECT 'RD' FROM DUAL) C LEFT JOIN EXIMTRX.FADA_MASTER F ON F.FA_BUSI_TYPE=C.CATEGORY AND F.FA_BUSI_TYPE=S.SERIES AND F.C_UNIT_CODE='{{SYS_BUSI_UNIT}}' GROUP BY S.SERIES, C.CATEGORY) ORDER BY SERIES, CATEGORY
